title: Harden serial Work Item, budget, Contract, and release evidence gates
outOfScope: Changing application runtime behavior or release workflow implementation.
Deleting historical Work Item or release evidence.

sources.reason: Contract validation and semantic placeholder rules.
Preflight readiness and fail-closed decision model.
Lifecycle closure evidence and cleanup behavior.
Governed command surface and finish checks.

riskAssessment.reason: The change hardens existing governance checks and adds regression coverage without changing product runtime behavior.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized hardening the lifecycle, budget, Contract, and release evidence process.

preReviewWarnings: Review that serial and budget gates fail closed without requiring a network provider.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints before implementation and finish to prevent governance drift.

acceptance: Code-mode Contract placeholders are rejected before implementation and Preflight surfaces the actionable reason.
A successor Work Item is blocked until predecessor lifecycle evidence is complete.
Budget impact is declared and checked against policy; over-budget work requires explicit repayment or a separate repair Work Item.
Release evidence distinguishes historical, candidate, and published states and requires source-bound proof.
All AI, project, and regression checks pass.
guidelines: Hard gates must fail closed and produce actionable evidence paths.
Historical Work Item and release evidence must remain immutable.

intent.problem: The previous serial execution exposed four process weaknesses: predecessor ordering was not hard-gated, complexity budget drift was discovered late, skeleton Contracts were structurally valid but placeholder-only, and release evidence needed explicit state separation.
constraints: Keep one Work Item, one dedicated branch, and one PR.
Do not change application runtime behavior or release workflow implementation.
Use deterministic local checks so CI enforces the same rules as the Skill.
intent.rationale: Skill guidance prevents omission, while repository guards prevent incorrect execution when a procedural step is missed.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Placeholder code-mode skeleton is blocked before implementation.
Successor Work Item is blocked until predecessor lifecycle evidence is complete.
Budget overrun requires repayment or a separate repair Work Item.
Release evidence cannot promote candidate or historical evidence without source-bound proof.

rawUserRequest: 同意，请开始修正。将生命周期顺序、预算预估、Contract 前置和发布证据分层固化到 Skill 与仓库门禁中。

declaredIntent.summary: Harden the AI Cockpit workflow so procedural omissions fail closed.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized improving the process and solidifying it into Skill and repository gates.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore the previous governance checks, templates, and tests.
